publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2021-07-28 18:28:11 UTC.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.abstract: Negatives and photographic prints of Cornell University buildings, professors, athletic events, and campus scenes.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Fenner photographic collection, #4-3-2881. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

scopecontent.head: Scope and content
scopecontent.p: Collection consists of negatives and photographic prints of Cornell University buildings, professors, athletics, and events. Photographs were taken by John (?) Fenner, an Ithaca photographer. The work dates from 1889 through 1953, however the majority of the images were taken in the 1930s and 1940s.

did.unittitle: Vet. Medical Society, Charter Members Plaque
Albert, Prof. and Mrs. Calvin Dodge
Andrews, Prof. and Mrs. Mrs. E. P.
Brauner, Prof. O. M. and family
Series IV. Assorted - Very large glass plate negatives
